_comment_top: UDS reference skillOverrides — see skills/README.md §Skill Tiers and docs/skill-budget-tuning.md for usage. Merge the skillOverrides block below into your ~/.claude/settings.json or project .claude/settings.json. Tier 3 skills remain callable via /<name>; only their descriptions are hidden from Claude's auto-discovery listing to save context budget.
_comment_provenance: Generated per DEC-061 / XSPEC-185. Adopters are free to override (promote a Tier 3 to 'on' or demote any to 'name-only' / 'user-invocable-only').
